RuleForge.DEV_ONLY_KEY_COMMENT: Dev-only shared secret sent as X-AERO-Key to the local RuleForge. Must match the RULEFORGE_API_KEY the engine is started with.

Jwt.DEV_ONLY_KEY_COMMENT: The key below is a dev-only local signing key — never use in production. Production takes Jwt:Key or the JWT_KEY environment variable.
